final_prompt.prompt:
Create a social media cover image for a Xiaohongshu (小红书) creator account, featuring a 9-grid layout (九高格) (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "素人风格" (authentic creator / "real person" amateur) aesthetic — references in the spirit of 2010s Tumblr soft girl visual culture, Sanrio kawaii illustration heritage, early Xiaohongshu creator flat-lay tradition; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 九高格 (9-grid) layout, central title placement
Subject: must include DJI Pocket 4 (大疆pocket4) as the featured product
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" (central title, cute and differentiated typography)
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 九高格 grid structure
Avoid:
